label: Wound
description: A single wound overlay graphic and the conditions under which it renders. Nested class inside FleshTypeDef.

texture.label: Texture
texture.description: Texture path used for all cardinal rotations when per-direction textures are not set.

textureSouth.label: Texture south
textureSouth.description: Texture path for the south-facing view. Used with per-direction texture sets.

textureEast.label: Texture east
textureEast.description: Texture path for the east-facing view.

textureNorth.label: Texture north
textureNorth.description: Texture path for the north-facing view.

textureWest.label: Texture west
textureWest.description: Texture path for the west-facing view.

flipSouth.label: Flip south
flipSouth.description: Flip the south-facing texture horizontally at render time.

flipEast.label: Flip east
flipEast.description: Flip the east-facing texture horizontally at render time.

flipNorth.label: Flip north
flipNorth.description: Flip the north-facing texture horizontally at render time.

flipWest.label: Flip west
flipWest.description: Flip the west-facing texture horizontally at render time.

scale.label: Scale
scale.description: Uniform scale multiplier applied to the wound graphic. Defaults to 1.

drawOffsetSouth.label: Draw offset south
drawOffsetSouth.description: World-space draw offset applied when the pawn faces south.

drawOffsetEastWest.label: Draw offset east/west
drawOffsetEastWest.description: World-space draw offset applied when the pawn faces east or west.

color.label: Color
color.description: Tint color applied to the wound graphic. Defaults to white (1, 1, 1, 1).

tintWithSkinColor.label: Tint with skin color
tintWithSkinColor.description: Whether to additionally tint the wound graphic with the pawn's skin color.

flipOnWoundAnchorTag.label: Flip on wound anchor tag
flipOnWoundAnchorTag.description: Wound anchor tag name (e.g. LeftEye) that triggers horizontal mirroring of this overlay.

flipOnRotation.label: Flip on rotation
flipOnRotation.description: Cardinal rotation direction that triggers horizontal mirroring. Corresponds to Verse.Rot4 values.

onlyOnPart.label: Only on part
onlyOnPart.description: Restrict this wound overlay to a specific body part. Absent means the overlay may appear on any body part.

displayOverApparel.label: Display over apparel
displayOverApparel.description: Whether the wound graphic renders above apparel layers. Defaults to true.

displayPermanent.label: Display permanent
displayPermanent.description: Whether the wound overlay remains visible after the injury heals.

missingBodyPartFresh.label: Missing body part fresh
missingBodyPartFresh.description: Filter this overlay to fresh (true) or old (false) missing-part hediffs. Absent means no filter applies.
